Maria Clara, here is the budget for the second trip. I have to be honest, it is limited this year.
I understand. How much money do we have, and how many people can travel?
We have enough for four people, but not enough for the whole delegation. And the spending on accommodation is too high.
I agree. The hotel near the center is too expensive. We could find a hotel with a better balance of price and location.
Good idea. But we still have too many requests and not enough approvals. Every department wants a seat.
Then we need a clear priority. Documentation is first, we can't cut corners with the visas.
So should I allocate more money to preparation and less to the extras?
Yes. Allocate a little more to the documents, and do not exceed the budget on the dinners. That is the safe plan.

Hi Maria Clara, it is Bruno. A quick update before our budget meeting. The news is not perfect. This year the budget is limited, and we do not have enough money for the whole delegation. There are too many requests, because every department wants a seat, but there are not enough approvals from the finance office. The spending on accommodation is too high, because the hotel near the center is too expensive. In my opinion, we should set a clear priority and allocate more money to the documents. We can't cut corners with the visas. Please think about it, and we talk tomorrow. Thank you.

Good morning. This is a short message from the finance office, with the rules for the delegation budget. Please listen before you plan the trip. First, the budget is limited this year, so every department has a maximum amount, and you should not exceed it. Second, the priority is documentation and travel. We allocate enough money for the flights and the visas, but only a little for extra materials. Third, the spending on dinners and gifts is too high in many reports, so please keep it low. And one more thing. If you need more than your amount, you must ask for approval one week before. Thank you, and please remember: a good plan keeps a healthy balance.
